instinct.value: to amass more followers, more power

system.concept: A mystic who tore their soul from their body and now burns followers' lives for power.
system.tags: solitary, spirit, undead, magical, devious, organized
system.qualities: Tethered to some object; telepathic; powerful will. Armor 1 (lacks organs).
system.description: Some who practice the Rime Lords' teachings push themselves beyond their limits — their bodies fail, and they become rage-filled specters or ever-hungry wraiths. But imagine an adept who saw their body and life as a resource to expend rather than a liability to overcome: one who deliberately severed their mind and spirit from their body and gathered a herd of followers (victims) around them, to serve as fuel for their mighty arts.

items.name: Attract followers with promises of greatness, easily achieved
Eat away at someone's emotions, memories, or will
Siphon a follower's lifeforce to mimic some art of the Rime Lords
